name: pi-web-mode-internal
description: Internal Web mode source for Pi Coding Agent.
author: Federico Jaramillo Martinez

scripts.dev: bash -c 'trap "kill 0" EXIT; npm run dev:sessiond & npm run dev:web & npm run dev:client & wait'
scripts.dev:web: bash -c 'set -e; npm run build:plugins; npm run build:plugin-packages; trap "kill 0" EXIT; npm run dev:plugins & npm run dev:plugin-packages & tsx watch src/server/index.ts & wait'
scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && npm run build:plugins && npm run build:plugin-packages && vite build && shx cp package.json dist/package.json
scripts.build:plugin-packages: bash -c 'set -e; shopt -s nullglob; for package in plugins/*/package.json; do dir=${package%/package.json}; (cd "$dir" && npm run build --if-present); done'
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test
